## What this changes

## Why

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New detector
- [ ] New framework adapter
- [ ] Pricing table update
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check magicrails tests` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / docstrings if a public API changed
- [ ] If this is a new adapter: file is under 60 lines and follows the pattern in `magicrails/adapters/`
- [ ] If this is a pricing update: cited the source (vendor pricing page) in the PR description
